selections.name: Decalogue
selections.reason: Huge class drop after running 4th in the G2 Tulloch Stakes last start. Inside draw is a massive advantage here. Clear top pick.

selections.name: Crusader Voyage
selections.reason: Third-up today and ready to peak. Solid 2nd at Hawkesbury last start and gets Tommy Berry aboard.

selections.name: Scoop The Pool
selections.reason: Racing consistently with back-to-back placings. James McDonald takes the ride which is a strong positive.

selections.name: Sarapo (GB)
selections.reason: Made ground late for 3rd at Warwick Farm last start. Should be fit and competitive.

danger_horse.name: Crusader Voyage
danger_horse.reason: Waller trained and peaking third-up, main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Events
selections.reason: Excellent debut when 2nd at Rosehill. Draws the inside barrier which is critical at this track. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Yattazou
selections.reason: Resuming for Chris Waller with James McDonald booked. Showed ability last prep and trialled well.

selections.name: Cheeky Sort
selections.reason: Racing well recently, 2nd at Wyong last start. Should be prominent from a good draw.

selections.name: Cold Gin
selections.reason: Resuming. Has shown glimpses of ability and gets a favorable draw.

danger_horse.name: Yattazou
danger_horse.reason: Elite trainer/jockey combo and capable of a big run fresh.

selections.name: Graffiti Tycoon
selections.reason: Strong debut when 2nd at Warwick Farm. Draws the inside gate which is a huge advantage here. Promising.

selections.name: Loera
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and ran a solid 2nd at Rosehill. Will push forward and give a sight.

selections.name: Kawerau (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on debut at Rosehill. James McDonald rides for Waller, commands respect.

selections.name: Pink Persuasion
selections.reason: Placed 3rd at Newcastle last start. Has race experience and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Loera
danger_horse.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner with tactical speed, will be hard to catch if she crosses easily.

selections.name: Wrathful (GB)
selections.reason: Strong closing 2nd at Rosehill last start. James McDonald takes the ride. Ready to win.

selections.name: Cap Saint Martin (FR)
selections.reason: Third-up and peaking. Solid 4th at Kensington last start. Major player.

selections.name: Oso Spirited (NZ)
selections.reason: Won well at Warwick Farm two back. Draws inside and will be prominent.

selections.name: Agita
selections.reason: Third-up. Forgive last start, capable of better on previous form.

danger_horse.name: Cap Saint Martin (FR)
danger_horse.reason: Peaking third-up and has the class to challenge the top pick.

selections.name: Spanish Artist
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Rosehill last start. Waterhouse/Bott trained with Tim Clark aboard. Should dictate terms.

selections.name: Superfabulistic (NZ)
selections.reason: Strong 2nd at Hawkesbury last start. Drawn perfectly to get a soft run.

selections.name: Erin Jo (NZ)
selections.reason: Good 2nd at Newcastle fresh. Will strip fitter and has claims.

selections.name: Angel City
selections.reason: Won well at Canberra last start. In form and can measure up.

danger_horse.name: Superfabulistic (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Stablemate to the top pick, drawn well and racing in great form.

selections.name: Man Of Worth (IRE)
selections.reason: Resuming. Won well at Warwick Farm before the break. James McDonald rides for Waller.

selections.name: Mafia
selections.reason: Tommy Berry takes the ride. Solid 6th at Kensington last start. Capable of sharp improvement.

selections.name: Sonofdec
selections.reason: Resuming. Draws the inside gate which is crucial. Has won fresh previously.

selections.name: Mogwai
selections.reason: Resuming. Good draw and has trialled okay. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Mafia
danger_horse.reason: Jockey upgrade to Tommy Berry makes this horse a serious threat.

selections.name: Xpresso
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Rosehill last start. Draws the inside barrier which is a massive advantage on this track.

selections.name: Against The Law
selections.reason: Good 3rd at Gosford last start. Racing well and looks a strong winning hope.

selections.name: Dear Jewel
selections.reason: Nice 2nd at Hawkesbury last start. Consistent and can feature in the placings.

selections.name: The Face
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Capable of better and gets a reasonable draw.

danger_horse.name: Against The Law
danger_horse.reason: In good form and looks ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Blitzgal
selections.reason: Impressive debut winner at Rosehill. James McDonald sticks. Looks very progressive.

selections.name: Rajwa
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten 2nd at Canterbury last start. Drawn well and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Rach
selections.reason: Draws the inside rail which is gold here. Tommy Berry rides for Waller.

selections.name: Show Business
selections.reason: Won well at Wyong last start. Up in class but racing with confidence.

danger_horse.name: Rajwa
danger_horse.reason: Just missed last start over this track and distance. Major threat.
